Name: UAIPerceptionStimuliSourceComponent
Description: Gives owning actor a way to auto-register as perception system's sense stimuli source

Functions.Name: RegisterWithPerceptionSystem
Functions.Description:
Registers owning actor as source of stimuli for senses specified in RegisterAsSourceForSenses. 
	 	Note that you don't have to do it if bAutoRegisterAsSource == true

Functions.Name: RegisterForSense
Functions.Description: Registers owning actor as source for specified sense class

Functions.Name: UnregisterFromPerceptionSystem
Functions.Description: Unregister owning actor from being a source of sense stimuli

Functions.Name: UnregisterFromSense
Functions.Description: Unregisters owning actor from sources list of a specified sense class
